_meta.description: PAX trees for the Technomancer (Worldslayer). Two interlinked branches. All three paths within a branch share a 'universal' trunk before splitting into top/middle/bottom. Unlocks at level 30; PAX points earned through Worldslayer progress.
_meta.notes: Node effect text consolidated from GamerGuides skill lists and the Fandom wiki. Exact pixel positions/links of the visual tree are not encoded; paths (universal/top/middle/bottom) capture the branch topology.

nodes.name: Initial Striker
nodes.desc: Activating skills increases your Anomaly Power or Firepower by 10% for 5 seconds, depending on which is higher.

nodes.name: Brain Dead
nodes.desc: Activating Decay or Gadget skills increases your Weapon Damage by 15% for 5 seconds.

nodes.name: Lethal Devices
nodes.desc: Your Ordnance and Gadget skills inflict Toxic to enemies hit and deal additional 5% of Anomaly Power as damage if Toxic was refreshed.

nodes.name: Pain Killer
nodes.desc: Damaging an enemy grants you 2% Health Regeneration for 3 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Permanence
nodes.desc: Inflicting Toxic on an enemy has 100% chance to inflict a random additional status.

nodes.name: Dissection
nodes.desc: You deal 5% more damage to enemies for every status inflicted on them.

nodes.name: Necrotic Tissue
nodes.desc: Damage against Elite enemies is increased by 20% when using a Sniper Weapon.

nodes.name: Twin Reaper
nodes.desc: Sniper Weapon shots have a 75% chance to trigger an echo, dealing 25% of the damage dealt by the shot.

nodes.name: Break Their Ranks
nodes.desc: Your Interrupt skills remove Effect Resistance from hit Elites. 7 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Depleted Core
nodes.desc: Your Ordnance skill's damage is increased by 100% of your Status Power.

nodes.name: The Undying
nodes.desc: Every 5% of your missing Health increases your Weapon Leech and Skill Leech by 5%.

nodes.name: Accelerator
nodes.desc: Your Weapon Damage is increased by 100% of your Weapon Leech.

nodes.name: Override
nodes.desc: Your Anomaly Power is increased by 100% of your Skill Leech.

nodes.name: Apothecary
nodes.desc: You pulse every 5 seconds, healing all players within a 25 meter radius for 2% of all damage done by you between each pulse.

nodes.name: Purification Protocol
nodes.desc: Your Turrets pulse in a 25 meter radius, removing up to 1 negative status effect from you and your allies.

nodes.name: Leadseeker
nodes.desc: Your Turrets pulse in a 25 meter radius, replenishing 30% of ammo and granting 20% increased damage for 5 seconds for you and your allies.

nodes.name: Biosync
nodes.desc: Your Overheal is converted to a 3 second Health Regeneration effect for you and your allies.

nodes.name: Kinetic Converter
nodes.desc: Critical Shots heal the nearest ally for 20% of their Max Health. If Overheal occurs, the player also receives 30% increased damage for 5 seconds. 5 second cooldown.

nodes.name: Hastened Influence
nodes.desc: Reduce remaining cooldown of one of your skills by 0.5 seconds for every status removed by you or applied to an enemy by any player.

nodes.name: Burrowing Charge
nodes.desc: Your Critical Shots place an explosive charge on enemies, detonating with the next Critical Shot for 250% of your Anomaly Power.
